mapper.insert: insert into im_room_member(room_id, user_id, role, version) values (#{roomId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{role}, #{version})
mapper.select: select room_id, user_id, version, null as occurred_at_epoch_millis from im_room_member where (room_id > #{roomCursor, jdbcType=BINARY}) or (room_id = #{roomCursor, jdbcType=BINARY} and user_id > #{userCursor, jdbcType=BINARY}) order by room_id asc, user_id asc limit #{limit}
select current_version from im_membership_version_counter where id = #{id} for update
mapper.insert: insert into im_membership_version_log(version, room_id, user_id, active) values (#{version}, #{roomId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{active})
